title: Tagine with Beans and Butter
description: A flavorful and hearty North African stew made with beans, butter, and a hint of lebanese spices.

ingredients.name: dried beans
ingredients.notes: such as chickpeas or kidney beans

ingredients.name: lebanese spice mix
ingredients.notes: or use ground cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

ingredients.name: tagine spice
ingredients.notes: such as ras el hanout or paprika

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: or use vegetable broth for added flavor

instructions: Heat the butter in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the lebanese spice mix and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the dried beans and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the beans are tender.
Stir in the tagine spice and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Optional: add a splash of fizzy water for a tangy twist.
